rule: Agents should author structured intent, evidence, decisions, and routing first. Prose remains only when it explains judgment, adapts structured state for people, or preserves audit evidence.

entries.purpose: Carry bounded execution intent, proof, closeout, residue, and continuation state.
entries.structured_owner: planning execplan JSON fields and closeout_distillation buckets
entries.prose_role: Generated adapter text should summarize the structured fields for humans and external trackers.

entries.purpose: Tell an external work tracker what changed and what proof ran.
entries.structured_owner: execplan execution_summary, proof_report, durable_residue, and follow_up fields
entries.prose_role: Adapter output only; it must not become the source of closeout state.

entries.purpose: Preserve bounded findings, evidence, impact, and recommendation when analysis should outlive chat.
entries.structured_owner: planning review schema and review template records
entries.prose_role: Explain judgment and evidence without inventing new section shapes.

entries.purpose: Preserve durable anti-rediscovery knowledge, routing, promotion, and staleness metadata.
entries.structured_owner: memory manifest metadata and note templates
entries.prose_role: Keep only the durable explanation that cannot be recovered from metadata.

entries.surface: Planning handoff output and interruption/resume summaries
entries.purpose: Recover current intent, constraints, touched surfaces, proof expectations, and next action across agents.
entries.structured_owner: planning handoff_contract and active execplan fields
entries.prose_role: Compact handoff prose should be rendered from the same fields rather than improvised.

entries.purpose: Record outcome, quality, efficiency, cognitive load, anti-overfitting review, and routed improvement signals.
entries.structured_owner: agent feedback schema, improvement signal contract, and execplan improvement_signal_review
entries.prose_role: Explain tradeoffs after structured impacts and routing are captured.

entries.purpose: Give weak or generic agents a minimal route into compact commands.
recurring_patterns: open raw surfaces only when compact output points there
entries.structured_owner: workspace config, defaults startup section, and generated adapter renderer
entries.prose_role: Thin compatibility adapter over structured startup routes.

entries.surface: Archived execplans and historical review artifacts
entries.purpose: Preserve evidence for audit and reconciliation without becoming ordinary operating input.
entries.structured_owner: finished-work inspection, closeout reconciliation, and explicit residue routing
entries.prose_role: Audit evidence only; compact reports should surface derived signals instead of asking agents to read archives.

top_follow_up_candidates.intent: Generate closeout and archive prose from structured fields.
top_follow_up_candidates.why_first: Closeout prose is high-frequency, proof-sensitive, and already has structured fields that can own the truth.

top_follow_up_candidates.intent: Add constrained templates for review, handoff, and self-improvement prose.
top_follow_up_candidates.why_first: These surfaces still need judgment prose, but recurring section shapes should not be improvised.

top_follow_up_candidates.intent: Prefer structured note metadata over repeated explanatory prose.
top_follow_up_candidates.why_first: Memory metadata repeats routing and promotion facts that can be validated without making agents read full notes.
